LightningComponentBundle.description: Displays a labelled value on a Flow screen, styled as a standard Salesforce read-only form field.

property.name: label
property.label: Field Label
property.description: The field label displayed above the value.

property.name: fieldType
property.label: Field Type
property.description: Controls how the value is formatted. Accepted values: text (default), date, datetime, number, currency, percent, phone, email, url.
